name: @aqa/admin
description: Admin panel for agentic-qa-kit — hi-fi wired SPA, 30 screens (port of design handoff v2).

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('[@aqa/admin] no unit tests; e2e suite under test:e2e (Playwright).')"
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; for (const p of ['dist','.tsbuildinfo','node_modules/.vite','playwright-report','test-results']) { try { rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch {} }"
